body:
## Summary

- Establish shared test infrastructure for Phase B-6 Tier-1 entity coverage work (Appointments, DoctorAvailabilities, Patients, Locations, ApplicantAttorneys).
- Introduce single-orchestrator seed pattern, Bogus synthetic-data library, `[Collection]` retrofit on existing Doctor reference tests, and `TreatWarningsAsErrors=true` at the project level.
- Infrastructure-only: no new test assertions added; all 13 existing tests still pass.

## Motivation / Context

Phase B-6 is the last outstanding Phase-B criterion (SonarCloud coverage 7.3% -> 60% overall, 80% new-code). Tier-1 adds coverage for 5 critical-path entities across 5 PRs (1A-1E). PR-0 is the infrastructure prerequisite ‚Äî every Tier-1 PR depends on this foundation.

Research summary and ratified decisions (Q1-Q9) captured in [docs/plans/2026-04-20-phase-b6-tier1.md](docs/plans/2026-04-20-phase-b6-tier1.md). Kickoff context: [docs/plans/PHASE-B6-TEST-COVERAGE-KICKOFF.md](docs/plans/PHASE-B6-TEST-COVERAGE-KICKOFF.md).

Key non-obvious drivers:
- ABP forum #571 confirms multi-`IDataSeedContributor` execution order is **non-deterministic**. A single orchestrator (with entity-level private `SeedXAsync` methods) is the only guaranteed-safe model.
- The existing Doctor reference tests were missing the `[Collection(...)]` attribute that `test/CLAUDE.md` explicitly mandates. Adding it now before Tier-1 PRs start ensures consistent xUnit collection-fixture behaviour.
- `Directory.Build.props` had `TreatWarningsAsErrors=false` ‚Äî the `-warnaserror` guarantee was CI-only. Flipping to `true` aligns local and CI behaviour.

## Changes

**New test infrastructure** (in `test/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.TestBase/Data/`):
- `CaseEvaluationIntegrationTestSeedContributor.cs` ‚Äî single orchestrator replacing per-entity contributors.
- `TestStringUtility.cs` ‚Äî Bogus setup with deterministic `Randomizer.Seed = 20260420`, plus hex-string / 555-phone / SSN-shaped fallback helpers.
- `DoctorsTestData.cs` ‚Äî extracted Doctor1/Doctor2 GUIDs + field constants.
- `IdentityUsersTestData.cs` ‚Äî StaffAdmin / Attorney / Patient user GUIDs (ready for PR-1A to use as FK targets).

**Migrated to orchestrator**: `test/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.Domain.Tests/Doctors/DoctorsDataSeedContributor.cs` **deleted**; logic moved into orchestrator's `SeedDoctorsAsync`.

**Test code changes**:
- `DoctorApplicationTests.cs` + `DoctorRepositoryTests.cs` ‚Äî reference `DoctorsTestData.*` constants instead of inline GUID / hex literals.
- `EfCoreDoctorsAppServiceTests.cs` + `DoctorRepositoryTests.cs` ‚Äî `[Collection(CaseEvaluationTestConsts.CollectionDefinitionName)]` added.
- `BookAppService_Tests .cs` renamed to `BookAppServiceTests.cs`; concrete `EfCoreBookAppService_Tests.cs` -> `EfCoreBookAppServiceTests.cs`; class names de-underscored.

**Project + build settings**:
- `test/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.TestBase/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.TestBase.csproj` ‚Äî added `Bogus` 35.6.5, `Bogus.Healthcare` 35.6.5, and `ProjectReference` to the Domain project.
- `Directory.Build.props` ‚Äî `TreatWarningsAsErrors` flipped `false` -> `true`.

**Docs + rules**:
- `docs/plans/2026-04-20-phase-b6-tier1.md` ‚Äî Tier-1 execution plan with `status: in-progress`.
- `.claude/rules/test-data.md` ‚Äî rewritten to permit both hex-string and Bogus patterns (both HIPAA Safe-Harbor compliant).

## Test Plan

- [x] `DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet build HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.slnx -c Release -warnaserror` ‚Äî 0 warnings, 0 errors.
- [x] `DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet test HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.slnx -c Release --no-build` ‚Äî all 13 existing tests pass (5 Doctor App + 2 Doctor Repo + 3 Book + 3 Sample).
- [x] `DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=Development dotnet format HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.slnx --verify-no-changes --no-restore` ‚Äî clean.
- [x] Husky `pre-commit` (gitleaks + lint-staged) ‚Äî passed.
- [x] Husky `pre-push` (gitleaks full tree + `dotnet build -c Debug`) ‚Äî passed.
- [ ] CI `ci.yml` all jobs green (verify after push).
- [ ] CI `sonarcloud.yml` informational (Quality Gate may stay as-is; coverage delta expected ~0 since no new test assertions).

## Risk / Rollback

Blast radius: test infrastructure only; no production code touched. Worst case: test suite breaks; no impact on running services.

Rollback: `git revert <squash-sha>` restores the prior `DoctorsDataSeedContributor` layout, unwinds the `[Collection]` additions, and resets `TreatWarningsAsErrors=false`.

Specific risks flagged in the plan:
- PHI scanner hook false-positive on Bogus output ‚Äî not exercised in PR-0 (no Bogus-generated data committed yet; first use lands in PR-1A).
- `TreatWarningsAsErrors=true` flip surfacing latent warnings ‚Äî none fired; `dotnet build -warnaserror` returned 0/0 on the full solution.

## Screenshots

N/A (no UI change).

## Dependencies

New NuGet references in `test/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.TestBase/HealthcareSupport.CaseEvaluation.TestBase.csproj`:
- `Bogus` 35.6.5 ‚Äî Apache-2.0, bchavez.
- `Bogus.Healthcare` 35.6.5 ‚Äî verified active (last published 2025-10-25).

Also added a `ProjectReference` from `TestBase` to the Domain project so the orchestrator can directly insert entities via `IDoctorRepository`.

`packages.lock.json` updated in all 4 test projects as a consequence.

## Breaking change

None.

## HIPAA / PHI Impact

- [x] No PHI in code, tests, fixtures, or logs.
- [x] No real patient data used in examples or screenshots.
- [x] Logging redacts identifiers where applicable.

`.claude/rules/test-data.md` updated to permit Bogus alongside hex-string pattern. Both are HIPAA Safe-Harbor compliant:
- Hex strings: random bytes, cannot match any of HIPAA's 18 identifier categories by construction.
- Bogus: stochastic synthetic data, deterministically seeded for reproducibility, does not reference real patients and does not carry identifying data about any real person.

The PHI scanner hook still enforces the 18-category rule at tool-use boundaries.

## Closes

N/A ‚Äî B-6 Tier-1 is tracked in `docs/plans/2026-04-20-phase-b6-tier1.md` (no linked GitHub issue).
title: chore(tests): add phase b-6 pr-0 shared test infrastructure
